---
title: "TWEEDIE"
generated: true
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TWEEDIE -->
```python
TWEEDIE = tweedie(1.5)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:TWEEDIE -->
*TODO: describe this type alias / constant.*
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
